todos: Film 3 new Looksmax-coach demo variations (new scan results; questions: 'What's my worst feature', 'Am I cooked or is there hope', 'Rate me honestly')
Launch the new variations as $10/day ABO test ad groups
Confirm the Jun 29 TESTING ad is fully paused (1.84s watch, $58.56, 0 conversions)
Prep a replacement/refresh for the main CBO creative - fatigue signs (7d CPA $49.26 vs $32 norm, 2.75s watch yesterday)

actions.title: Kill Jun 29 TESTING creative
actions.detail: $58.56 spend over 48h, 0 conversions, 1.84s avg watch time (below 2.5s kill line), 0.5% CTR. No spend yesterday - confirm it's paused.

actions.title: Main CBO creative showing fatigue
actions.detail: 7d: $1,674.87 spend, 34 conv, $49.26 CPA vs $32 historical. Yesterday: $239.78, 0 TikTok conv, watch time down to 2.75s from 3.5s.

actions.title: Concentration risk: 100% of spend on one creative
actions.detail: The Apr 29 CBO ad took all of yesterday's $239.78 spend. No active test creatives in pipeline after TESTING ad stopped.

actions.title: Restock ABO test pipeline with coach-demo variations
actions.detail: Test pipeline is empty. Launch 3 new Looksmax-coach screen-recording variations at ~$10/day each.

actions.title: Install spike: 458 installs Jul 1 (vs ~200/day avg)
actions.detail: Blended CAC $0.52 yesterday ($239.78 / 458 PostHog installs), 90.2% onboarding completion. Likely organic spike - worth finding the source.

formats: Looksmax coach demo: type 'What's my worst feature' into the AI coach, show a new person's scan results, scores, then routine
